data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for guest privileges.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the guest privileges, specifically the ability to bring a friend once a month. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions guest privileges but lacks concrete evidence of its functionality or validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or usage of guest privileges (bring friend once/month).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
